reviews.comment:
Martín, no solo fue eficiente cargando combustible, sino atentamente invitándome a hacerme socio de mi querido y valorado ACA, de quien fui socio durante décadas algunas otras décadas atrás.
Retornando a la Argentina me duele ver al país como está. Me enorgullece ver al ACA seguir siendo un positivísimo ejemplo argentino.

(Translated by Google)
Martín was not only efficient at pumping fuel, but he also graciously invited me to become a member of my beloved and esteemed ACA, of which I was a member for decades.
Returning to Argentina, it pains me to see the country in its current state. I am proud to see the ACA continue to be such a positive example for Argentina.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sZmFVMTZhV3QwUVVsaU1FbEJWMmxZV1ZGcVpHYxAB
